545.reason: [Incorrect logic for distinguishing FuncDef from Decl: should check current token for 'const'/'int'/'char' to identify Decl first, and only treat as FuncDef when seeing type followed by IDENFR and LPARENT. Also fails to handle MainFuncDef properly which must come last.]

Also fails to handle MainFuncDef properly which must come last.]
